STATUS: 200
HEADER: Content-Type: text/html
EXPECT: none
NOTE: Body contains invalid UTF-8 byte sequences (0xff 0xfe 0xfd). Substring search (bytes.Contains) is byte-safe so no panic / no false-positive against latin-1 or mojibake content.
---
<html><body>Invalid UTF8: ÿþý ÝÆØ Č Š Ž stránka v cp1250 možná?</body></html>
